mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, summary, cover_image AS coverImage, view_count AS viewCount, link_url AS linkUrl, publish_time AS publishTime, created_at AS createdAt, source FROM articles
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%'))
AND source = REPLACE(#{source}, '"', '')
ORDER BY publish_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(#{search}, '"', ''), '%'))
AND source = REPLACE(#{source}, '"', '')
